title: Square
sourceTitle: Create Premium Square Reference Style Wildlife Infographic

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a premium square “reference-style wildlife infographic” centered around a rare and mysterious wild animal called the {ANIMAL_NAME}, designed as a beautifully curated natural-history handbook page rather than a children’s educational poster.
The composition should feel like a modern visual encyclopedia mixed with an elite zoology field guide and high-end editorial infographic system.
Visual Direction:
• 1:1 square composition
• Soft earthy-toned natural-history background with subtle botanical sketches, scientific textures, faded field-journal notes, and wildlife documentation aesthetics
• Elegant muted palette using moss green, ivory, earthy brown, charcoal black, muted olive, and warm beige accents
• Refined editorial typography hierarchy
• Rounded modular information cards with clean spacing
• Gentle realistic shadows and premium UI-style dividers
• Minimal scientific iconography
• Extremely detailed central animal render viewed in dramatic natural pose inside its authentic habitat
• Thin precision annotation lines pointing toward biological adaptations and survival features
• Clean, organized “knowledge-first” layout with high information density but breathable spacing
Main Subject Presentation:
A stunning ultra-detailed realistic render of the {ANIMAL_NAME} placed at the center, featuring hyper-detailed fur/skin/scales textures, realistic eyes, natural environmental lighting, accurate anatomy, authentic posture, and premium wildlife photography realism.
Surround the animal with scientific callouts and magnified detail circles explaining:
• anatomical adaptations
• camouflage traits
• sensory abilities
• locomotion systems
• feeding mechanisms
• evolutionary features
• skeletal structure
• environmental survival traits
• behavioral adaptations
• reproductive or social patterns
Include modular infographic sections such as:
• Species Overview
• Scientific Classification
• Geographic Range
• Habitat & Ecology
• Diet & Feeding Behavior
• Size & Physical Statistics
• Activity Pattern Timeline
• Conservation Status
• Threats & Protection Efforts
• Evolutionary History
• Similar Species Comparison
• Skeletal / Anatomical Breakdown
• “Top 5 Incredible Facts” section
• Why This Species Is So Rare
• Human Interaction & Conservation Awareness
Add small premium visualization modules like:
• habitat distribution maps
• ecosystem interaction diagrams
• skeletal anatomy illustrations
• behavioral workflow charts
• size comparison graphics
• conservation meter visuals
• activity cycle timelines
• field observation sketches
• adaptation comparison charts
• miniature scientific blueprint-style drawings
Style Keywords:
“premium zoology encyclopedia”
“editorial wildlife handbook”
“museum-quality animal reference page”
“scientific wildlife infographic”
“high-end biology poster”
“natural-history editorial design”
“modular wildlife knowledge system”
“ultra-detailed animal visualization”
Avoid:
• cartoon aesthetics
• fantasy creature styling
• overly colorful children’s poster looks
• cluttered infographic layouts
• unrealistic anatomy
• exaggerated cinematic action scenes
The final result should resemble a professionally published natural-history reference-book page created for wildlife enthusiasts, zoologists, biologists, conservationists, museums, and educational archives.
